title: ChatCompletionMessage
description: A chat completion message generated by the model.

refusal.description: The refusal message generated by the model.

role.description: The role of the author of this message.

annotations.description:
Annotations for the message, when applicable, as when using the
[web search tool](https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/tools-web-search?api-mode=chat).

audio.description:
If the audio output modality is requested, this object contains data about the
audio response from the model.
[Learn more](https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/audio).

tool_calls.description: The tool calls generated by the model, such as function calls.
